meaning: Real Estate Investment Trust 不动产投资信托公司,房地产投资信托公司
examples: But the gold rocks that we not have a REIT market?
Another hotspot in real estate finance is the real estate investment trust (REIT).
The United States currently has more than 300 REIT shares in the Stock Exchange listing.
Bucksbaum has staunchly resisted paying himself the outsize salaries that more flamboyant REIT managers collect.
Lacking an official appraisal, you can try a kindred measure--the market capitalization of the REIT.
